Interface IUtilityNetworkSource

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that describe utility network source.

[Guid("A5C54FA2-0BB6-43F5-9017-1244A6CC7725")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IUtilityNetworkSource : INetworkSource
